summary: Frontend-only review of iter 226 (Phase 3 of 224-225 series). All 11 user-requested checks pass: AbortError fix verified, planner layout vertical-stack restructure verified, spending->result-income link works, annualised table renders 34 rows, member/relationship fields drive ownership pills correctly, ClientHome+Documents+Snapshot stripped of emerald/rose/amber.
critical_code_review_comments: Review request item #3 stated 'spending=200000 -> result-income should stay at projectedIncome cap (e.g., $700k+)'. The actual code uses achievableSpending = min(projectedIncome, annualSpending), which means at spending=200000 with projectedIncome~$838k, result is $200k (capped by spending). This is the correct behaviour for an 'achievable spending' headline and matches the KPI strip (ACHIEVABLE $200k = DESIRED $200k = +$638k SURPLUS = $838k projected). The review-request expectation phrasing is inconsistent with the implementation; flag for product clarification but no fix needed.
Code quality: RetirementPlannerMoneySmart.jsx is now a large file (>700 lines likely). Consider extracting AnnualisedTable, KpiStrip, and ProjectionChart into separate components for maintainability.
test_credentials: n/a — localStorage flags only (wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='adviser'|'client', selected_client=thompson_family)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified on https://decision-engine-109.preview.emergentagent.com. KEY POINTS for next agent: (1) AbortError: navigated /advisor-command-center -> /dashboard -> /quick-overview -> /retirement-planner with ZERO console errors and ZERO page errors. safeFetch helper effective. (2) Retirement planner layout: planner-kpi-strip(top) -> sections stacked -> results-panel(div, not aside) -> annualised-table-card(bottom). All 6 sections present (about-you, income, super, other, spending, advanced). 34 annualised rows rendered. (3) input-spending=40000 -> result-income=$40k; input-spending=200000 -> result-income=$200k (min(projectedIncome, annualSpending) cap). (4) Thompson defaults: input-your-salary=485004 (from client). 2 super rows: David=You owner pill, Sarah=Partner owner pill auto-set via `member` field. (5) /client-home: 0 occurrences of emerald-700/600, amber-700, rose-600; 17 navy refs + 6 gold refs. (6) /documents: 0 occurrences of bg-green-100/bg-blue-100/bg-amber-100/bg-purple-100. (7) /dashboard Snapshot: 0 #10b981, 0 #ef4444, 0 text-emerald-600, 41 #1a2744 navy refs. (8) /api/health returns 200 with status:healthy.
